summary: Iteration 51: Verified P0 enrollment toggle feature. Backend API working correctly (9/9 tests passed). Frontend UI correctly shows/hides card details based on enrollment_open state. Admin Panel has enrollment toggle and closure dropdown working.

ui_bugs.issue: Programs section includes is_upcoming=true programs (Quad Layer Healing). Should filter out upcoming programs.
ui_bugs.note: This is a carry-over bug from iteration_50

action_items: Fix ProgramsSection.jsx to filter out is_upcoming=true programs (carry-over from iteration_50)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - Enrollment toggle feature working; Programs section filter bug persists

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 tested P0 enrollment toggle feature. All features working correctly: (1) GET /api/programs?upcoming_only=true returns enrollment_open and closure_text fields (2) PUT /api/programs/{id} can update enrollment_open and closure_text (3) Admin Panel 'Programs Hub' tab shows enrollment toggle and closure dropdown for each program (4) Homepage Upcoming card shows full details when enrollment ON, shows closure badge only when enrollment OFF. One outstanding bug: Programs section still shows is_upcoming=true programs.

verified: Timing with timezone conversion (9PM-10PM IST / 3:30PM-4:30PM UTC)
Programs Hub tab has Enroll toggle column
Toggle shows 'Open' in green when enrollment ON
Closure dropdown appears when enrollment OFF
Closure options: Registration Closed, Seats Full, Enrollment Closed, Sold Out
Cards show image with mode badges
Cards have only Know More button
NO dates, countdown, pricing, tier selector, enroll button
PUT /api/programs/{id} can set enrollment_open to false
PUT /api/programs/{id} can set enrollment_open to true
All 4 closure_text options can be saved
Enrollment toggle changes reflect in upcoming list
All programs have closure_text field with default

outstanding_bug.reason: Programs section displays Quad Layer Healing (is_upcoming=true) which should only appear in Upcoming section
